name: SVG Icon Set

icons.name: Evergreen Tree
icons.svgCode:
<svg viewBox="0 0 220 250">
<!-- Trunk -->
      <rect x="105" y="170" width="10" height="55" fill="var(--evergreen-trunk)" rx="2"/>
      <!-- Tree layers (bottom to top) -->
      <polygon points="110,50 150,140 70,140" fill="var(--evergreen-dark)"/>
      <polygon points="110,70 145,130 75,130" fill="var(--evergreen-mid)"/>
      <polygon points="110,90 140,120 80,120" fill="var(--evergreen-light)"/>
      <!-- Triangular conifer shape -->
      <polygon points="110,45 160,170 60,170" fill="var(--evergreen-dark)" opacity="0.9"/>
      <polygon points="110,65 150,155 70,155" fill="var(--evergreen-mid)" opacity="0.9"/>
      <polygon points="110,85 140,140 80,140" fill="var(--evergreen-light)" opacity="0.9"/>
    </svg>
